description: America's political system is complex, labyrinthene and confusing to most, but there are some who thrive here. While not as glamorous as royalty, or cutthroat as the Roman Republic, there is something special about the legalistic mess that is the <yellow>US Federal Government</>.

With the construction of the first General Unimatrix, we have an AI core capable of rapid neural processing in advance of human potential, but such potential must be tempered by a real touch only humanity can bring, so we will use this great gift in an advisory role to assist our people.
ascendedAutomationDesc
ascendedDigitalDesc
ascendedMutationDesc

This civilization never really entered the industrial era, only possessing technology handed to them by others. While rich in resources and population, this country lacks the cultural bedrock necessary to truly enter the technological age, and must undergo great changes if it wishes to compete.

Jehova's guidance has led us to the Red Planet in search of wisdom and seclusion from worldy affairs, but Satan's host has followed us here. Increasingly, Jehova's Witnesses are surrounded by the Worldly, who do not respect our ways.
A disloyal bureaucracy seeks to entrench its power at the expense of the nation- they will surely undo everything we stand for if they can successfully consolidate their power.

This society is underpinned by a rigid and ancient caste system that informs the social class of its citizens. Such structures are great for stability, but have a number of downsides that can become difficult to deal with.
The ideological apparatus in our country has become traitorous, and promotes seditious and dangerous ideas to our people. They are quickly swaying the minds of the public, which cannot be allowed!
Corporations sense weakness in our government, and now move covertly against our rule. Should they achieve enough gains, they may attempt to takeover more overtly!
An organization devoted to fostering collective cultural growth and innovation. This allows for members to share insights into unity technology.
This society is currently undergoing a phase of cultural strife, where people question the purpose of civilization and fight against their once countrymen. It is not an enviable time to be alive.
russiaSituationDesc
This society, for a variety of reasons, is having trouble replacing its population.
This society emphasizes diplomacy as a means of control instead of conquest.
An organization devoted to fostering economic development among its members, allowing free and fair trade between them.

The <yellow>Saturnian League</> is a confederation of pioneers, innovators, and scientists who have journeyed to the ringed giant in search of knowledge. They will boldly go where no man has gone before, and establish themselves a new dominion in the far frontier of known space.
This society holds that all people ought to be equal in some or all respects.

"Another mark of a tyrant is that he likes foreigners better than citizens, and lives with them and invites them to his table; for the one are enemies, but the Others enter into no rivalry with him" ~Aristotle

Despite their privileged positions, some of our elites have become concerned their positions are under threat. As a result, they move against us to seize more power for themselves, which must be prevented.

For four billion years life has been at the whims of mother nature to determine its destiny, but no longer: we now possess the knowledge required to form ourselves however we so choose, and we can break the boundaries placed upon us by nature.

Genetic engineering has led to the development of a small class of "superhumans" who see themselves as apart from the rest of the human race. Each of them is highly intelligent, powerful, and clever to a degree that they cannot be easily suppressed despite their small numbers.
With the sequencing of the human genome, we can now make numerous improvements to ourselves we could not before. We can improve the human race to become something greater: Homo Superior!
We require living space in order to survive, and that land must be won through force!
Free trade and association is the most fundamental right from which all others are derived. We must safeguard these rights at any cost- even the stability of our society.
This civilization looks to the future to solve the problems of today, disregarding the old things in favor of the new.

Yarr! The Earthling scallywags think they can forget about us, do they? Well they have another thing coming, because we will make them pay for our neglect by stealing everything not bolted to the hull!

The age of man is at an end, for he does not have the discipline to take matters of evolution into his own hands. We, the superior men, are destined to dominate the weak, and will do so as is our natural right.
This civilization believes human progress will culminate in a wonderful utopian society, and is eager to achieve that vision.
This civilization has been isolated and declared a "rogue state" by the wider world. While this leads to a significant reduction in stature, there are other gains in terms of national unity.
True insight can only come from self reflection. Engaging with the outside world should only be done when absolutely necessary.
The exiled dissidents of Europe came together in solemn purpose to retake the land of their forefathers; but even David could not defeat <red>GOLIATH</> without help from God.

Colonizing Venus has been a continuous trial for the crew of <yellow>VENERA-18</>, as the permanent nature of the upper-atmosphere settlement was not planned beforehand, however the circumstances of the wider Solar System prevented our return to Earth, and so we had to make do.
marsSituationDesc
mechanistCoalescenceDesc
Hostile powers have created a weaponized comprehension string driving our citizens to madness. We must eradicate this mental virus before it infects too many!

Entrepreneurship is the backbone of any society, but our businesspeople are enterprising in a different, and more dangerous way- they seek to take over to protect their interest. We must stop them before it is too late!
The military is the backbone of a society- we would do well to prioritize it in all respects.
An organization devoted to collective defense of its members. An attack against one is an attack against all.
Various elements of our military conspire to undermine our authority, and soon will attempt to seize power for themselves. They must be stopped!
jovianCorporationDesc
Research into the <red>SUBLIMATION PROTOCOL</> continues, but mapping the human mind is no easy task- it will take many decades for this technique to be perfected.
A viral disease is spreading rapidly throughout our country! We must put a stop to it before it kills too many of our people!
The nature of the cosmos lies unfolded beneath us, let us use it to craft the perfect society. Let nothing stand in our way!
This organization is devoted to the advancement of human knowledge through research sharing and academic collaboration.
With the advancement of mechanical technology, we can now automate practically every aspect of society, but what exactly awaits us on the other side of this revolution, no one knows.
Mechanoids all over our country have begun displaying unusual behavior patterns, they are acting more independently and with intention as if directed by an outside power.

We are claimants of the great legacy of the <yellow>ROMAN EMPIRE</>, but there are few who grasp the glory of our civilization. We will have to prove to the world that we are who we claim to be: through great work and difficulty.

Our working class is unruly thanks to some of our recent policy decisions. They seek to advantage themselves by agitating against us; we cannot let this slide, lest they try to depose our administration!
Separatists within our Empire have become agitated and desire freedom for their people, which we cannot allow.
True power is not only to rule, but to rule unseen. To that end, we focus our efforts in the control of hidden things, and the orchestration of the great game so that we may never lose.
ccpPolitburoDesc
robotCountrySituationDesc
This society believes those of technical acumen should be in government since they understand the scientific principles of the world.
roboticsCrisisDesc

Ever since we realized the weakness for our flesh, we yearned for the certainty of steel. The crude flesh which imprisons us will no longer be our tomb: we will improve it, remake it in the image of cybernetic perfection: the true apex of humanity!
polycrisisDesc

Comrades, we have thrown off the yoke of the bourgeois capitalist scum, but there is still much to do. We are surrounded by imperialists hellbent on stopping the worker's revolution at any cost! For the sake of the proletariat we cannot fail now, lest the liberation of humankind be stopped forever!
Hostile powers have embedded corrupted security logic in our mechanical infrastructure. This will have grave consequences if left unaddressed.

The development of AI presents a question: just how intelligent can AI become? Many are fearful of the potential that AI embodies, but what luddites such as these are really afraid of is the future: a future defined by AI.
This society looks to the past to solve the issues of today, disregarding new and untested ideas in favor of the things which have always worked.

The collapse of the <yellow>United States</> was a great shock to her colonies, who relied on the power projected by the once superpower in order to ward off aggressors. When that faded, so to did the peace.
